title: Yeesabella 200 Pcs Assorted Pom Poms, 1cm Colorful Portable Fluffy Pom Poms Balls Multicolor Fuzzy Craft Poms Ball for DIY Creative Crafts Decorations Arts Projects Small Polypropylene Lightweight
features: ITEM DIMENSIONS: Each pom pom has a diameter of approximately 1 cm.
PACKAGE INCLUDED: You will receive 200 pom poms per pack, featuring various beautiful colors that are sure to spark joy and creativity.

GOOD QUALITY: Our pom poms are made from high-quality materials, ensuring durability and longevity. Each pom pom is carefully crafted to maintain its shape and fluffiness, providing a visually appealing aesthetic.
ENDLESS CREATIVITY: Unleash your boundless creativity with these versatile pom poms. They can be used for various craft projects, such as DIY home decorations, artwork, school projects, and more.

WIDE RANGE OF APPLICATIONS: These pom poms are perfect for adding a fun and lively touch to your projects. Whether you're creating unique jewelry, embellishing clothing or accessories, or even adding a playful accent to gift wrapping, these pom poms are sure to delight.
